svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="总览" id="overview"> <mxGraphModel dx="-564" dy="-222" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="620" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="input" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="业务描述 / PRD" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="150" x="40" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="inputNote" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;" value="用户旅程
应该发生什么" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="150" x="40" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="agent" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="Agent
业务逻辑分析 + 执行" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="68" width="180" x="290" y="248" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ends" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;dashed=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=4;" value="点到点跨三端" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="400" width="460" x="580" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="h5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="H5 前端
uni-app / Playwright" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="180" x="610" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="backend" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="运营后台
Spring Boot + Element Plus" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="200" x="820" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mp" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="微信小程序
automator / wx.login" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="180" x="610" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="db" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="后端 + DB + 日志
跨系统数据追踪" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="200" x="820" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pay" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="微信支付 mock
定时任务分账" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="240" x="700" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="script" parent="1" style="shape=mxgraph.flowchart.document;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="沉淀 Playwright 脚本
持续复用" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="220" x="380" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="input" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;endArrow=classic;" target="agent"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="agent" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;endArrow=classic;" target="ends" value="跨系统点击"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="ends" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontSize=11;endArrow=classic;dashed=1;" target="script" value="跑通即固化"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
